findings.resolution: Added a path-free real operational-database rehearsal that uses the Online Backup API, restores only isolated temporary targets, injects and verifies automatic rollback, and proves the source file and directory remain unchanged.
findings.summary: Phase 11.2 used only disposable nonfinancial SQLite, so the Stage 11 real backup/restore rehearsal gate was not yet evidenced.

findings.resolution: The online backup source now opens through SQLite URI mode=ro with query_only and relies on SQLite Online Backup consistency; it no longer creates an application lock file beside the source. A source-directory immutability regression test was added.
findings.summary: create_online_backup created a coordination lock in the source directory, preventing a strict source-zero-write claim.

findings.resolution: Backup, inspect and restore CLI receipts now omit database and directory paths; restore reports only the generated rollback artifact basename. Tests reject temporary absolute-path disclosure.
findings.summary: The operator CLI emitted absolute local database, backup, target and rollback paths into terminal/log output.

findings.resolution: Added a loopback-only headless Chrome/Playwright validator covering the built static surface, unknown-route 404, manifest, DOM, accessibility tree, screenshot, sanitized trace and zero external requests.
findings.summary: The public boundary had source/build scanners but no browser screenshot, DOM, accessibility or trace evidence required for a browser-facing phase.
